summary: LendPay is a Move-native credit and installment app on an Initia MiniMove rollup. Users connect with InterwovenKit, resolve their .init identity, request a loan onchain, receive operator approval and disbursement, and repay installments onchain.
notes: Replace all TODO values before submission.
At minimum, keep one valid deploy evidence field populated: rollup_chain_id, deployment_tx_url, or deployment_url.
Initia Usernames is the primary native feature for this submission.
